allow: PowerShell($procs = Get-Process -Name powershell -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Count: $\($procs.Count\)"; $procs | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Id\)  $\($_.StartTime\)  $\($_.MainWindowTitle\)" })

PowerShell(Set-Location c:\\Projects\\vo\\poker; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $count = git rev-list --count HEAD; Write-Output "commits: $count"; Write-Output "--- log ---"; git log --oneline -5; Write-Output "--- status ---"; git status --short)
